'''B-1 series''' [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droids]] were highly advanced automatons circa [[600 BBY/Legends|600 BBY]]. One such droid, [[B-1D4]], was used by [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[4-8C]] in "[[The Heart of Steel]]" project in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

{{Droid-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 13: Prisoner of the Nikto Pirates]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars Missions 14: The Monsters of Dweem]]''
*''[[Star Wars Missions 15: Voyage to the Underworld]]''
*''[[Star Wars Missions 16: Imperial Jailbreak]]''
